title: Black Plastic Door Stops, 2 cm (Pack of 5) - Durable & Stylish Design, Ideal for Home or Office Use
features: STYLISH DESIGN: The sleek black aesthetic of these door stops adds a touch of sophistication to your space while fulfilling a practical need without compromising on style.
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Each door stop in this pack of 5 is crafted from high-quality plastic, ensuring longevity and resistance to wear and tear, perfect for both home and office environments.
EASY TO USE: Simply position the door stop under any door to prevent it from closing. Ideal for maintaining airflow and access, or for preventing slamming and potential door damage.
VERSATILE USE: Whether for residential or commercial use, these door stops provide an effective solution for keeping doors open, ensuring easy access, and improving ventilation throughout the space.
UNIVERSAL FIT: With a height of 2cm, these door stops are designed to work seamlessly with most standard doors, offering versatility and convenience across various settings.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality pack of door stoppers is design in black durable rubber with a height of 2cm. Suitable for use around the home or at the office. Safety Warning No warning applicable
